message:
Fix structured dtype handling, NaN risk sanitization, and lossy fallback logic

fnp-dtype: Add Structured self-cast in can_cast_lossless, add
empty_with_len() for structured storage, respect field offsets in
record_size(), block Structured<->numeric casts, fix first-column
dtype mismatch detection. Comprehensive tests for all edge cases.

fnp-runtime: Clamp NaN risk_score and hardened_validation_threshold
via clamp_probability() before comparison, preventing NaN from silently
bypassing validation. Tests for NaN sanitization and recorded decisions.

fnp-ufunc: Extract is_bridge_dtype_supported() predicate from
ensure_bridge_dtype_supported(). Fix lossy fallback to use F64 dtype
when bridge storage rejects fractional datetime/timedelta values instead
of preserving the unsupported dtype. Tests for fractional datetime,
timedelta, and complex lossy fallback paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
